name: aurelle-shopify-store
description: Aurelle — premium skincare Shopify theme (Liquid) for the Digital Heroes challenge

scripts.dev: pnpm build:js && shopify theme dev --path theme --store fetchwell-edyplil9.myshopify.com
scripts.push: pnpm build:js && shopify theme push --path theme --store fetchwell-edyplil9.myshopify.com
scripts.share: pnpm build:js && shopify theme share --path theme --store fetchwell-edyplil9.myshopify.com
scripts.package: pnpm build:js && shopify theme package --path theme
